---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div id="home-main" class="homepage-shell">

<div class="hero-grid">
<div class="hero-text">
<h1>Sophia Sufei Chen</h1>

<div class="hero-subtitle">✨ Final-Year Business Studies Student | Business Analytics | Marketing Strategy | Process Improvement</div>

<p class="linkedin-callout">
🔗 Let’s connect on LinkedIn and explore my academic background, business interests, and professional journey.
</p>

<a href="about.html" class="btn btn-primary">About Me</a>
<a href="projects.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Projects</a>
<a href="cv.html" class="btn btn-outline-dark">CV</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

<div class="hero-image">
<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Sophia Sufei Chen profile photo">
</div>
</div>

<div class="section-title">
<h2>✦ Profile Highlights</h2>
</div>

<div class="highlight-grid">

<a class="highlight-link" href="about.html">
<div class="highlight-card card-blue-1">
<div class="highlight-icon">👤</div>
<h3>About Me</h3>
<p>Academic background, internship experience, and professional interests.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a class="highlight-link" href="projects.html">
<div class="highlight-card card-blue-2">
<div class="highlight-icon">📊</div>
<h3>Projects</h3>
<p>Business analysis, venture development, and practical project work.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a class="highlight-link" href="cv.html">
<div class="highlight-card card-blue-3">
<div class="highlight-icon">📄</div>
<h3>CV</h3>
<p>Education, internship experience, work history, and key strengths.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a class="highlight-link" href="reflection.html">
<div class="highlight-card card-blue-4">
<div class="highlight-icon">💭</div>
<h3>Reflection</h3>
<p>Learning outcomes, portfolio development, and future direction.</p>
</div>
</a>

</div>

<div class="contact-strip">
<h3>📬 Contact</h3>
<div class="contact-row">
<div class="contact-pill">📧 chensophia0921@gmail.com</div>
<div class="contact-pill">📱 +353 0876535880</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
